_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Off-load and review control system audit logs and review for anomalies.
reference_document_element_description: Implement model monitoring and observability systems that detect data drift, prediction drift, and performance degradation, triggering alerts or automated retraining workflows when defined thresholds are exceeded.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI AI domain. AI-T-017 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DQ-T-014 (DQ, cosine: 0.423), TF-A-002 (TF, cosine: 0.420).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.6/10 (raw 0.357). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DCWF-only terms [anomalies, audit, control, load, logs, off] vs WIDAI-only terms [alerts, automated, data, defined, degradation, detect] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.865 (P=0.877, R=0.852). P exceeds R by 0.025 — the DCWF element's 11 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 26 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Off-load and review control system audit logs and review for anomalies." and "Implement model monitoring and observability systems that detect data drift, pre" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.429 > STS 0.357 (gap +0.072). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [none] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 3.0%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DCWF terms: [anomalies, audit, control, load, logs, off]. WIDAI terms: [alerts, automated, data, defined, degradation, detect].
